title: EVENTS AND CLASSES - 211info
text: MULTNOMAH COUNTY LIBRARY EVENTS AND CLASSES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides an online community calendar to help community members find classes and events held at local libraries. Events and classes include job seeker resources (support groups and resume workshops), computer help classes and access to computers, arts and crafts instruction, book clubs and discussion groups, chess clubs, cultural celebrations and festivals, early reading skills, teen programming, lectures and author talks, money and finances programming, performances and exhibitions, story times, and special programs for parents with children ages 0-6. Eligibility: Some classes or computer lab services may require a library card Hours: Varies by class or event Email (503) 988-5123 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Helpline (503) 988-5123 Contact Center Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: View calendar online or call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, Russian, Vietnamese, Chinese AREA SERVED: Multnomah County Services: Arts and Crafts Instruction Children's Library Services Computer Literacy Training Programs Cultural Heritage Programs Financial Literacy Training Prejob Guidance Public Internet Access Sites Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL PROGRAMS - ADULT LITERACY TUTORING EDUCATIONAL PROGRAMS - CITIZENSHIP CLASSES EDUCATIONAL PROGRAMS - GED HELP EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - HOMEWORK CENTER INFORMATION SERVICES - MOBILE AND PARTNER LIBRARIES SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - MY DISCOVERY PASS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
